basic_details.job_title: Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Presidency University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website presiuniv.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Microbiology with first division
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Microbiology with first division. Master's degree in Microbiology with first division (desirable). Previous research experience in microbiology and materials science (desirable). NET qualified (preferred).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Presidency University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Presidency University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Presidency University Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Microbiology with first division. Master's degree in Microbiology with first division (desirable). Previous research experience in microbiology and materials science (desirable). NET qualified (preferred).

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Presidency University Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Presidency University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant post at Presidency University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant position at Presidency University is 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Microbiology with a first division. A Master's degree in Microbiology with first division is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 27000 to Rs. 35100 per month, which includes a basic salary and HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at Presidency University will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their application via email to the designated address.

faq.question: Q7. Where is Presidency University located?
faq.answer: Presidency University is located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxation benefits for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the interview date for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The interview for the Project Assistant post is scheduled to be held on 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
